# Jonathan Bouniol — jonathanbouniol.com

> Jonathan Bouniol is a French Data & AI student at Mines Paris PSL and Albert School in Paris, France. He specializes in data engineering, artificial intelligence, and business strategy.

## Identity

- Full name: Jonathan Bouniol
- Nationality: French
- Location: Paris, France
- Email: jbouniol@albertschool.com
- Website: https://jonathanbouniol.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jonathanbouniol
- GitHub: https://github.com/jbouniol

## Education

- MSc Data & AI for Business — Mines Paris PSL × Albert School (2026–2028)
- Bachelor Business & Data — Albert School × Mines Paris PSL (2023–2025)
- Baccalauréat (High Honors, Mathematics & SES) — Ecole Pascal (2020–2023)

Albert School is Europe's first data-centric business school, operating in partnership with Mines Paris PSL (France's #2 engineering school).

## Professional Experience

- Data & IT Transformation Intern — Generali France (Jul–Dec 2025)
- Right-Hand to CEO (Intern) — Sunver (May–Jul 2024)
- Sous-Officier Reserviste — Commissariat du Numerique de Defense (CND) (2024–present, classified)

## Leadership & Involvement

- Vice President & CTO — Albert Junior Consulting (Jul 2024–Jul 2025)
- Campus Leader — Notion (Sep 2025–present)
- Student Representative — Albert School (Sep 2023–present)
- Ambassador — Capgemini (2024–2025)

## Projects (19 total)

Categories: Business Deep Dives (BDD), Hackathons, Consulting Missions, School Projects.

Business Deep Dives are 3-week consulting-grade case studies for real companies, part of the Albert School × Mines Paris PSL curriculum.

Companies worked with: Generali, Henkel, La French Tech, Linkpick, Louis Vuitton, SNCF, Ministere des Armees, Capgemini, BNP Paribas, Carrefour, CMA-CGM, Edmond de Rothschild, Asmodee, X-HEC Entrepreneurs, Villablu (Robertet).

Hackathon results: 4 wins, multiple podiums.

## Skills

Python, SQL, Scikit-learn, PyTorch, Qlik Sense, Power BI, Streamlit, Excel/VBA, Make, Zapier, Notion, Power Platform, GenAI, RAG Systems.

## About this site

jonathanbouniol.com is a personal portfolio site built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. It features an AI-powered search (Mistral AI), project and experience detail pages, and a public /about page.

## Disambiguation

Jonathan Bouniol (Data & AI, Mines Paris PSL, Paris, French) should not be confused with other individuals sharing the same name.
